blended.narrative: Shawnee Peak is expecting dry conditions over the next 48 hours with little to no accumulation. The 14-day outlook shows 9 inches total. Mild temps with highs near 47°F.

daily_summary.narrative: Today: light freezing drizzle, highs of 47°F.
Sunday: 2.5" of snow, highs of 32°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Monday: 4" of snow, highs of 38°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
